---
title: "Digital Infrastructure"
subtitle: "Open-Source, UNIX & Apple infrastructure for businesses of all sizes"
description: "Production-grade open-source, Linux, BSD, and Apple Business infrastructure for SMBs. NixOS, OpenBSD, FreeBSD, Nextcloud, and zero-touch Apple device deployment."
from: markdown+raw_html
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>
        .platform-badge {
          display: inline-block;
          padding: 0.25rem 0.75rem;
          border-radius: 2rem;
          font-size: 0.8rem;
          font-weight: 600;
          margin: 0.15rem;
        }
        .badge-linux { background: rgba(255, 193, 7, 0.15); color: #FFC107; }
        .badge-bsd { background: rgba(220, 53, 69, 0.15); color: #DC3545; }
        .badge-apple { background: rgba(108, 117, 125, 0.15); color: #6C757D; }
        .badge-opensource { background: rgba(129, 189, 74, 0.15); color: #81BD4A; }
        .badge-free { background: rgba(25, 135, 84, 0.15); color: #198754; font-weight: 700; }
        .pricing-card { border: 2px solid transparent; transition: all 0.3s ease; }
        .pricing-card:hover { border-color: #81BD4A; transform: translateY(-4px); }
        .pricing-card .card-header { font-size: 1.1rem; }
        .pricing-featured { border-color: #81BD4A; }
        .pricing-featured .card-header { background-color: #81BD4A !important; }
        .apple-business-highlight {
          background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(108,117,125,0.08) 0%, rgba(129,189,74,0.08) 100%);
          border-left: 4px solid #6C757D;
          padding: 1.5rem;
          border-radius: 0 0.5rem 0.5rem 0;
          margin: 1rem 0;
        }
        </style>
---

```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="/">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">Digital Infrastructure</li>
  </ol>
</nav>

<div class="hero-section">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="row align-items-center">
      <div class="col-md-8 offset-md-2 text-center">
        <h1><span class="text-dark">Digital</span> <span class="text-green">Infrastructure</span></h1>
        <p>Open-Source, UNIX & Apple platforms tailored for SMBs across every industry</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<style>
  .text-white { color: white !important; }
</style>
```

::: {.container .page-section}

## Infrastructure That Works for Your Business

We design, deploy, and manage production-grade digital infrastructure built on open-source software, UNIX operating systems, and Apple platforms. Our solutions are tailored for small and medium businesses in any activity domain -- from legal offices and clinics to manufacturing, retail, logistics, and creative studios.

::: {.row .mt-4}
::: {.col-md-4}
::: {.card .mb-4 .h-100}
::: {.card-body}
### <i class="bi bi-code-square text-success"></i> Open-Source Stack

Production-ready open-source tools that replace expensive proprietary software without sacrificing functionality.

<span class="platform-badge badge-opensource">Self-Hosted</span>
<span class="platform-badge badge-opensource">No Vendor Lock-in</span>

#### Includes:
- Productivity & collaboration suites
- Communication & messaging platforms
- Identity & access management
- Monitoring & observability
- DevOps & version control

[Learn More](#open-source){.btn .btn-outline-primary .mt-2}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.col-md-4}
::: {.card .mb-4 .h-100}
::: {.card-body}
### <i class="bi bi-terminal text-warning"></i> UNIX Systems

Enterprise-grade BSD and Linux infrastructure for servers, firewalls, storage, and networking.

<span class="platform-badge badge-linux">Linux</span>
<span class="platform-badge badge-bsd">BSD</span>
<span class="platform-badge badge-linux">NixOS</span>

#### Includes:
- Server deployment & hardening
- Firewall & network security
- Storage & backup systems
- Declarative infrastructure
- Hybrid environment bridging

[Learn More](#unix){.btn .btn-outline-primary .mt-2}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.col-md-4}
::: {.card .mb-4 .h-100}
::: {.card-body}
### <i class="bi bi-apple text-secondary"></i> Apple Infrastructure

Complete Apple ecosystem management with the new Apple Business platform and macOS fleet deployment.

<span class="platform-badge badge-apple">macOS</span>
<span class="platform-badge badge-apple">iOS/iPadOS</span>
<span class="platform-badge badge-free">Free MDM</span>

#### Includes:
- Apple Business setup & management
- Zero-touch device deployment
- Business email, calendar & directory
- Brand management on Apple Maps
- AppleCare+ for Business

[Learn More](#apple){.btn .btn-outline-primary .mt-2}
:::
:::
:::
:::

---

## Open-Source Stack for Business {#open-source}

Replace expensive proprietary licenses with battle-tested open-source alternatives. We handle the deployment, configuration, security hardening, and ongoing maintenance so your team can focus on their work.

```{=html}
<div class="row mt-4">
  <div class="col-lg-4 col-md-6">
    <div class="feature-card text-center mb-4">
      <div class="feature-card-icon">
        <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-richtext"></i>
      </div>
      <h3>Productivity & Collaboration</h3>
      <p>Full office suite, cloud storage, and real-time document collaboration for your entire team.</p>
      <small class="text-muted">LibreOffice | Nextcloud | Collabora Online | CryptPad | OnlyOffice</small>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="col-lg-4 col-md-6">
    <div class="feature-card text-center mb-4">
      <div class="feature-card-icon">
        <i class="bi bi-chat-dots"></i>
      </div>
      <h3>Communication</h3>
      <p>Secure messaging, video conferencing, and team channels with full data sovereignty.</p>
      <small class="text-muted">Matrix/Element | Mattermost | Jitsi Meet | Rocket.Chat</small>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="col-lg-4 col-md-6">
    <div class="feature-card text-center mb-4">
      <div class="feature-card-icon">
        <i class="bi bi-person-badge"></i>
      </div>
      <h3>Identity & Access</h3>
      <p>Single sign-on, directory services, and multi-factor authentication across all your systems.</p>
      <small class="text-muted">Keycloak | OpenLDAP | FreeIPA | Authelia</small>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="col-lg-4 col-md-6">
    <div class="feature-card text-center mb-4">
      <div class="feature-card-icon">
        <i class="bi bi-graph-up"></i>
      </div>
      <h3>Monitoring & Observability</h3>
      <p>Real-time dashboards, alerting, and uptime monitoring for your entire infrastructure.</p>
      <small class="text-muted">Prometheus | Grafana | Uptime Kuma | Zabbix | Loki</small>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="col-lg-4 col-md-6">
    <div class="feature-card text-center mb-4">
      <div class="feature-card-icon">
        <i class="bi bi-git"></i>
      </div>
      <h3>DevOps & Version Control</h3>
      <p>Self-hosted code repositories, CI/CD pipelines, and container orchestration.</p>
      <small class="text-muted">Gitea/Forgejo | Woodpecker CI | Docker | Podman</small>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="col-lg-4 col-md-6">
    <div class="feature-card text-center mb-4">
      <div class="feature-card-icon">
        <i class="bi bi-database"></i>
      </div>
      <h3>Databases & Storage</h3>
      <p>Reliable data storage, automated backups, and high-availability database clusters.</p>
      <small class="text-muted">PostgreSQL | MariaDB | Redis | MinIO | Restic</small>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

---

## UNIX Infrastructure {#unix}

We build and manage servers, firewalls, and network appliances on proven UNIX operating systems. Whether you need a hardened OpenBSD firewall, a NixOS declarative fleet, or a traditional Linux server stack, we deliver infrastructure that is secure, reproducible, and maintainable.

### Linux Distributions

```{=html}
<div class="row mt-4">
  <div class="col-md-4">
    <div class="card mb-4">
      <div class="card-header bg-warning text-dark">
        <h4 class="mb-0"><i class="bi bi-snow me-2"></i>NixOS</h4>
      </div>
      <div class="card-body">
        <p>Declarative, reproducible infrastructure. Define your entire system as code and deploy identical configurations across any number of machines.</p>
        <ul class="mb-0">
          <li>Immutable system configuration</li>
          <li>Atomic upgrades and rollbacks</li>
          <li>Reproducible builds across environments</li>
          <li>Flake-based multi-machine deployments</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="col-md-4">
    <div class="card mb-4">
      <div class="card-header bg-warning text-dark">
        <h4 class="mb-0"><i class="bi bi-ubuntu me-2"></i>Debian/Ubuntu</h4>
      </div>
      <div class="card-body">
        <p>The most widely supported Linux family. Ideal for application servers, web hosting, and workloads with broad software compatibility.</p>
        <ul class="mb-0">
          <li>LTS releases with 5+ years of support</li>
          <li>Massive package ecosystem</li>
          <li>Unattended security updates</li>
          <li>Proven in production at any scale</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="col-md-4">
    <div class="card mb-4">
      <div class="card-header bg-warning text-dark">
        <h4 class="mb-0"><i class="bi bi-building me-2"></i>RHEL/AlmaLinux</h4>
      </div>
      <div class="card-body">
        <p>Enterprise-grade stability for workloads that require vendor certification, compliance mandates, or long lifecycle support.</p>
        <ul class="mb-0">
          <li>10-year lifecycle support</li>
          <li>SELinux mandatory access control</li>
          <li>FIPS and Common Criteria certified</li>
          <li>Vendor-certified application stacks</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

### BSD Systems

```{=html}
<div class="row mt-4">
  <div class="col-md-4">
    <div class="card mb-4">
      <div class="card-header bg-danger text-white">
        <h4 class="mb-0"><i class="bi bi-shield-lock me-2"></i>OpenBSD</h4>
      </div>
      <div class="card-body">
        <p>The most secure general-purpose operating system. Ideal for firewalls, VPN gateways, and security-critical network appliances.</p>
        <ul class="mb-0">
          <li>pf packet filter (industry-standard firewall)</li>
          <li>Secure by default philosophy</li>
          <li>Built-in VPN (WireGuard, IKEv2)</li>
          <li>Minimal attack surface</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="col-md-4">
    <div class="card mb-4">
      <div class="card-header bg-danger text-white">
        <h4 class="mb-0"><i class="bi bi-hdd-stack me-2"></i>FreeBSD</h4>
      </div>
      <div class="card-body">
        <p>High-performance storage and networking. The foundation of Netflix CDN, WhatsApp, and Sony PlayStation Network.</p>
        <ul class="mb-0">
          <li>ZFS enterprise filesystem</li>
          <li>Jails containerization</li>
          <li>bhyve hypervisor</li>
          <li>Advanced networking (VNET, CARP)</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="col-md-4">
    <div class="card mb-4">
      <div class="card-header bg-danger text-white">
        <h4 class="mb-0"><i class="bi bi-cpu me-2"></i>NetBSD</h4>
      </div>
      <div class="card-body">
        <p>Runs on virtually any hardware. Perfect for embedded systems, IoT gateways, and legacy hardware repurposing.</p>
        <ul class="mb-0">
          <li>Supports 60+ hardware platforms</li>
          <li>Lightweight and efficient</li>
          <li>pkgsrc cross-platform packages</li>
          <li>Ideal for edge and IoT deployments</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

### Hybrid Environment Integration

```{=html}
<div class="row mt-4">
  <div class="col-md-12">
    <div class="card mb-4">
      <div class="card-body">
        <div class="row">
          <div class="col-md-3 text-center">
            <div class="process-step">
              <div class="process-icon">
                <i class="bi bi-people fs-1 text-primary"></i>
              </div>
              <h5>Directory Bridging</h5>
              <p>Samba/AD integration connecting UNIX systems with existing Windows environments</p>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="col-md-3 text-center">
            <div class="process-step">
              <div class="process-icon">
                <i class="bi bi-key fs-1 text-primary"></i>
              </div>
              <h5>Cross-Platform SSO</h5>
              <p>Single identity across Linux, BSD, macOS, and Windows systems</p>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="col-md-3 text-center">
            <div class="process-step">
              <div class="process-icon">
                <i class="bi bi-share fs-1 text-primary"></i>
              </div>
              <h5>File Sharing</h5>
              <p>Unified file access across all platforms via NFS, SMB, and WebDAV</p>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="col-md-3 text-center">
            <div class="process-step">
              <div class="process-icon">
                <i class="bi bi-printer fs-1 text-primary"></i>
              </div>
              <h5>Print & Peripherals</h5>
              <p>CUPS-based print management and peripheral sharing across mixed environments</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

---

## Apple Infrastructure {#apple}

We are early adopters and deployment partners for the new **Apple Business** platform, launching April 14, 2026. Apple Business replaces Apple Business Manager, Apple Business Essentials, and Apple Business Connect into a single, unified platform -- and the base service is **free**.

```{=html}
<div class="apple-business-highlight">
  <div class="row align-items-center">
    <div class="col-md-8">
      <h3 class="mb-2"><i class="bi bi-apple me-2"></i>Apple Business <span class="platform-badge badge-free">Free Platform</span></h3>
      <p class="mb-1">A new all-in-one platform for businesses of all sizes. Manage people and devices, reach customers, equip your team with essential tools, and get support from Apple experts.</p>
      <p class="mb-0 text-muted"><small>Available April 14, 2026 in 200+ countries and regions</small></p>
    </div>
    <div class="col-md-4 text-center">
      <a href="https://business.apple.com/preview" target="_blank" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-lg">
        <i class="bi bi-box-arrow-up-right me-2"></i>Apple Business Preview
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

### Device Management & Deployment

```{=html}
<div class="row mt-4">
  <div class="col-lg-4 col-md-6">
    <div class="feature-card text-center mb-4">
      <div class="feature-card-icon">
        <i class="bi bi-phone"></i>
      </div>
      <h3>Built-in MDM</h3>
      <p>Comprehensive mobile device management with full organizational visibility. No third-party MDM license required.</p>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="col-lg-4 col-md-6">
    <div class="feature-card text-center mb-4">
      <div class="feature-card-icon">
        <i class="bi bi-layers"></i>
      </div>
      <h3>Blueprints</h3>
      <p>Preconfigured device settings for zero-touch deployment. Employees unbox and start working immediately.</p>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="col-lg-4 col-md-6">
    <div class="feature-card text-center mb-4">
      <div class="feature-card-icon">
        <i class="bi bi-shield-lock"></i>
      </div>
      <h3>Managed Apple Accounts</h3>
      <p>Cryptographic separation between work and personal data. Full privacy for employees, full control for IT.</p>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="col-lg-4 col-md-6">
    <div class="feature-card text-center mb-4">
      <div class="feature-card-icon">
        <i class="bi bi-people"></i>
      </div>
      <h3>Team Management</h3>
      <p>Group employees by function or team. Assign apps, roles, and permissions at scale.</p>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="col-lg-4 col-md-6">
    <div class="feature-card text-center mb-4">
      <div class="feature-card-icon">
        <i class="bi bi-bag-check"></i>
      </div>
      <h3>App Distribution</h3>
      <p>Deploy business apps from the App Store to any number of devices -- from 10 to 10,000.</p>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="col-lg-4 col-md-6">
    <div class="feature-card text-center mb-4">
      <div class="feature-card-icon">
        <i class="bi bi-code-slash"></i>
      </div>
      <h3>Admin API</h3>
      <p>Programmatic device management for large-scale deployments and custom automation workflows.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

### Communication & Collaboration Tools

```{=html}
<div class="row mt-4">
  <div class="col-md-6">
    <div class="card mb-4">
      <div class="card-header bg-secondary text-white">
        <h4 class="mb-0">Business Email & Calendar</h4>
      </div>
      <div class="card-body">
        <ul>
          <li><strong>Custom Domain Email:</strong> Professional email on your own domain (bring existing or purchase new)</li>
          <li><strong>Calendar Delegation:</strong> Shared calendars and scheduling tools for teams</li>
          <li><strong>Company Directory:</strong> Built-in directory with personalized contact cards for every employee</li>
          <li><strong>iCloud Storage:</strong> Automatic backup and file synchronization (from $0.99/user/month)</li>
        </ul>
        <p class="text-muted mb-0"><small>Requires iOS 26, iPadOS 26, or macOS 26</small></p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="col-md-6">
    <div class="card mb-4">
      <div class="card-header bg-secondary text-white">
        <h4 class="mb-0">Brand & Customer Discovery</h4>
      </div>
      <div class="card-body">
        <ul>
          <li><strong>Brand Profiles:</strong> Manage your brand across Apple Maps, Wallet, and Mail</li>
          <li><strong>Rich Place Cards:</strong> Photos, business hours, location details on Apple Maps</li>
          <li><strong>Location Insights:</strong> Analytics on how customers discover your business</li>
          <li><strong>Custom Actions:</strong> Order, reserve, or book directly from Apple Maps to your website</li>
          <li><strong>Tap to Pay:</strong> Accept payments on iPhone with branded payment screens</li>
          <li><strong>Ads on Apple Maps:</strong> Promoted placement in search results and Suggested Places (U.S./Canada, summer 2026)</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

### Apple Business Pricing

```{=html}
<div class="row mt-4">
  <div class="col-md-4">
    <div class="card mb-4 text-center">
      <div class="card-header bg-success text-white">
        <h4 class="mb-0">Base Platform</h4>
      </div>
      <div class="card-body">
        <h2 class="text-success">Free</h2>
        <p>MDM, Blueprints, Managed Accounts, Brand Management, App Distribution, Admin API</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="col-md-4">
    <div class="card mb-4 text-center">
      <div class="card-header bg-primary text-white">
        <h4 class="mb-0">iCloud Storage</h4>
      </div>
      <div class="card-body">
        <h2 class="text-primary">$0.99+</h2>
        <p>Per user/month. Up to 2TB per user for backup, file sync, and collaboration.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="col-md-4">
    <div class="card mb-4 text-center">
      <div class="card-header bg-warning text-dark">
        <h4 class="mb-0">AppleCare+ for Business</h4>
      </div>
      <div class="card-body">
        <h2 class="text-warning">$6.99-$13.99</h2>
        <p>Per device/month. Expert technical support and hardware repair coverage.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

### Migration from Legacy Apple Services

If your business currently uses Apple Business Manager, Apple Business Essentials, or Apple Business Connect, all three are being discontinued on April 14, 2026. We handle the complete migration:

```{=html}
<div class="row mt-4">
  <div class="col-md-12">
    <div class="timeline">
      <div class="timeline-item">
        <div class="timeline-marker bg-success"></div>
        <div class="timeline-content">
          <h3>Audit Existing Setup</h3>
          <p>Review your current Apple Business Manager/Essentials configuration, enrolled devices, and managed Apple IDs.</p>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="timeline-item">
        <div class="timeline-marker bg-success"></div>
        <div class="timeline-content">
          <h3>Plan Migration</h3>
          <p>Map existing device groups, app assignments, and policies to Apple Business Blueprints and team structures.</p>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="timeline-item">
        <div class="timeline-marker bg-success"></div>
        <div class="timeline-content">
          <h3>Execute Transition</h3>
          <p>Migrate to the unified Apple Business platform. Business Connect data migrates automatically; device management requires re-enrollment planning.</p>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="timeline-item">
        <div class="timeline-marker bg-success"></div>
        <div class="timeline-content">
          <h3>Verify & Optimize</h3>
          <p>Confirm all devices, accounts, and brand profiles are operational. Optimize Blueprints and configure new features (email, calendar, directory).</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

---

## SMB Packages {#packages}

We offer tailored packages that combine Open-Source, UNIX, and Apple infrastructure to match your business size and needs. Every package is customizable to your specific industry requirements.

```{=html}
<div class="row mt-5">
  <div class="col-md-4">
    <div class="card pricing-card mb-4 h-100">
      <div class="card-header bg-primary text-white text-center">
        <h3 class="mb-0">Starter</h3>
        <small>1-10 employees</small>
      </div>
      <div class="card-body">
        <h4 class="text-center mb-4">For small teams getting started</h4>
        <ul>
          <li><i class="bi bi-check-circle text-success me-2"></i>Apple Business setup & Blueprints</li>
          <li><i class="bi bi-check-circle text-success me-2"></i>1 Linux server (Debian/Ubuntu)</li>
          <li><i class="bi bi-check-circle text-success me-2"></i>Nextcloud (files, contacts, calendar)</li>
          <li><i class="bi bi-check-circle text-success me-2"></i>Business email on custom domain</li>
          <li><i class="bi bi-check-circle text-success me-2"></i>Basic firewall (OpenBSD pf or UFW)</li>
          <li><i class="bi bi-check-circle text-success me-2"></i>Automated backups (Restic)</li>
          <li><i class="bi bi-check-circle text-success me-2"></i>Uptime monitoring</li>
        </ul>
        <div class="text-center mt-auto">
          <a href="https://cal.com/chenist" target="_blank" class="btn btn-outline-primary w-100">Book Consultation</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="col-md-4">
    <div class="card pricing-card pricing-featured mb-4 h-100">
      <div class="card-header text-white text-center">
        <h3 class="mb-0">Growth</h3>
        <small>11-50 employees</small>
      </div>
      <div class="card-body">
        <h4 class="text-center mb-4">For scaling businesses</h4>
        <ul>
          <li><i class="bi bi-check-circle text-success me-2"></i>Everything in Starter, plus:</li>
          <li><i class="bi bi-check-circle text-success me-2"></i>Full Apple MDM with team grouping</li>
          <li><i class="bi bi-check-circle text-success me-2"></i>OpenBSD dedicated firewall/VPN</li>
          <li><i class="bi bi-check-circle text-success me-2"></i>Keycloak SSO across all systems</li>
          <li><i class="bi bi-check-circle text-success me-2"></i>Matrix/Element team messaging</li>
          <li><i class="bi bi-check-circle text-success me-2"></i>Collabora Online (document editing)</li>
          <li><i class="bi bi-check-circle text-success me-2"></i>Prometheus + Grafana monitoring</li>
          <li><i class="bi bi-check-circle text-success me-2"></i>Samba/AD bridging (if needed)</li>
        </ul>
        <div class="text-center mt-auto">
          <a href="https://cal.com/chenist" target="_blank" class="btn btn-success w-100">Book Consultation</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="col-md-4">
    <div class="card pricing-card mb-4 h-100">
      <div class="card-header bg-warning text-dark text-center">
        <h3 class="mb-0">Enterprise</h3>
        <small>50+ employees</small>
      </div>
      <div class="card-body">
        <h4 class="text-center mb-4">For complex multi-site operations</h4>
        <ul>
          <li><i class="bi bi-check-circle text-success me-2"></i>Everything in Growth, plus:</li>
          <li><i class="bi bi-check-circle text-success me-2"></i>Apple Business Admin API integration</li>
          <li><i class="bi bi-check-circle text-success me-2"></i>NixOS declarative multi-server fleet</li>
          <li><i class="bi bi-check-circle text-success me-2"></i>FreeBSD ZFS storage cluster</li>
          <li><i class="bi bi-check-circle text-success me-2"></i>High-availability configurations</li>
          <li><i class="bi bi-check-circle text-success me-2"></i>Multi-site VPN mesh</li>
          <li><i class="bi bi-check-circle text-success me-2"></i>Compliance baselines (NIS2, GDPR)</li>
          <li><i class="bi bi-check-circle text-success me-2"></i>24/7 monitoring & incident response</li>
        </ul>
        <div class="text-center mt-auto">
          <a href="https://cal.com/chenist" target="_blank" class="btn btn-outline-warning w-100">Book Consultation</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

## Industries We Serve

Our digital infrastructure solutions are designed for **any activity domain**. We have experience across:

```{=html}
<div class="row mt-4">
  <div class="col-md-3 col-6">
    <div class="text-center mb-4">
      <i class="bi bi-building fs-1 text-primary"></i>
      <h5 class="mt-2">Legal & Consulting</h5>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="col-md-3 col-6">
    <div class="text-center mb-4">
      <i class="bi bi-heart-pulse fs-1 text-primary"></i>
      <h5 class="mt-2">Healthcare & Clinics</h5>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="col-md-3 col-6">
    <div class="text-center mb-4">
      <i class="bi bi-gear fs-1 text-primary"></i>
      <h5 class="mt-2">Manufacturing</h5>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="col-md-3 col-6">
    <div class="text-center mb-4">
      <i class="bi bi-shop fs-1 text-primary"></i>
      <h5 class="mt-2">Retail & Hospitality</h5>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="col-md-3 col-6">
    <div class="text-center mb-4">
      <i class="bi bi-truck fs-1 text-primary"></i>
      <h5 class="mt-2">Logistics & Transport</h5>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="col-md-3 col-6">
    <div class="text-center mb-4">
      <i class="bi bi-palette fs-1 text-primary"></i>
      <h5 class="mt-2">Creative & Media</h5>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="col-md-3 col-6">
    <div class="text-center mb-4">
      <i class="bi bi-mortarboard fs-1 text-primary"></i>
      <h5 class="mt-2">Education</h5>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="col-md-3 col-6">
    <div class="text-center mb-4">
      <i class="bi bi-bank fs-1 text-primary"></i>
      <h5 class="mt-2">Finance & Insurance</h5>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

## Why Choose chen.ist for Digital Infrastructure

```{=html}
<div class="row mt-4">
  <div class="col-md-6">
    <div class="card mb-4">
      <div class="card-header bg-success text-white">
        <h3 class="card-title mb-0">Our Expertise</h3>
      </div>
      <div class="card-body">
        <ul>
          <li><strong>UNIX Veterans:</strong> Deep expertise in BSD, Linux, and macOS administration spanning decades</li>
          <li><strong>Open-Source Contributors:</strong> We contribute to the tools we deploy -- not just consume them</li>
          <li><strong>Apple Business Early Adopters:</strong> Ready to deploy from day one (April 14, 2026)</li>
          <li><strong>Security-First Mindset:</strong> Every deployment is hardened by default, not as an afterthought</li>
          <li><strong>Cross-Platform Fluency:</strong> Seamless integration across UNIX, Apple, and Windows environments</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="col-md-6">
    <div class="card mb-4">
      <div class="card-header bg-success text-white">
        <h3 class="card-title mb-0">Our Approach</h3>
      </div>
      <div class="card-body">
        <ul>
          <li><strong>No Vendor Lock-in:</strong> Open-source and standard protocols ensure you always own your data and can switch providers</li>
          <li><strong>Right-Sized Solutions:</strong> We match infrastructure complexity to your actual business needs -- no over-engineering</li>
          <li><strong>Transparent Pricing:</strong> You pay for our expertise, not for software licenses</li>
          <li><strong>Knowledge Transfer:</strong> We document everything and train your team to be self-sufficient</li>
          <li><strong>Long-Term Partnership:</strong> Ongoing support, monitoring, and evolution as your business grows</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

:::

## Get Started

```{=html}
<div class="card mt-4 mb-5">
<div class="card-body">
<h3 class="mb-3"><i class="bi bi-pencil-square me-2"></i>Request a Consultation</h3>
<ul class="nav nav-tabs" id="regTabs-digital" role="tablist">
  <li class="nav-item" role="presentation">
    <button class="nav-link active" data-bs-toggle="tab" data-bs-target="#formReg-digital" type="button" role="tab">
      <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text me-2"></i>Register (Romania)
    </button>
  </li>
  <li class="nav-item" role="presentation">
    <button class="nav-link" data-bs-toggle="tab" data-bs-target="#calReg-digital" type="button" role="tab">
      <i class="bi bi-calendar-check me-2"></i>Book a Call (EU / International)
    </button>
  </li>
</ul>
<div class="tab-content pt-3">
  <div class="tab-pane fade show active" id="formReg-digital" role="tabpanel">
    <p class="text-muted"><i class="bi bi-geo-alt me-1"></i>Fill out the form and we.ll get back to you within 24 hours. We'll contact you within 24 hours.</p>
    <form action="https://formspree.io/f/mpwkaqev" method="POST">
      <div class="row">
        <div class="col-md-6 mb-3">
          <label class="form-label">Full Name *</label>
          <input type="text" class="form-control" name="name" required placeholder="Your full name">
        </div>
        <div class="col-md-6 mb-3">
          <label class="form-label">Email *</label>
          <input type="email" class="form-control" name="email" required placeholder="your@email.com">
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="row">
        <div class="col-md-6 mb-3">
          <label class="form-label">Phone</label>
          <input type="tel" class="form-control" name="phone" placeholder="Phone number">
        </div>
        <div class="col-md-6 mb-3">
          <label class="form-label">Company</label>
          <input type="text" class="form-control" name="company" placeholder="Company">
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="mb-3">
        <label class="form-label">Package Interest</label>
        <select class="form-select" name="interest">
          <option value="">Select a package...</option>
          <option value="starter">Starter (1-10 employees)</option>
          <option value="growth">Growth (11-50 employees)</option>
          <option value="enterprise">Enterprise (50+ employees)</option>
          <option value="custom">Custom / Not sure yet</option>
        </select>
      </div>
      <div class="mb-3">
        <label class="form-label">Tell us about your infrastructure needs</label>
        <textarea class="form-control" name="message" rows="3" placeholder="Current setup, number of devices, specific needs (Linux, BSD, Apple, open-source tools)..."></textarea>
      </div>
      <input type="hidden" name="_subject" value="Digital Infrastructure Inquiry from chen.ist">
      <input type="hidden" name="_source" value="digital-infrastructure">
      <input type="text" name="_gotcha" style="display:none">
      <div class="mb-3 form-check">
        <input type="checkbox" class="form-check-input" required>
        <label class="form-check-label">I agree to the <a href="/privacy.html" target="_blank">privacy policy</a> *</label>
      </div>
      <button type="submit" class="btn btn-success btn-lg w-100"><i class="bi bi-send me-2"></i>Request Consultation</button>
    </form>
  </div>
  <div class="tab-pane fade" id="calReg-digital" role="tabpanel">
    <p class="text-muted"><i class="bi bi-globe me-1"></i>Prefer a live conversation? Book directly in our calendar. Book directly in our calendar.</p>
    <a href="https://cal.com/chenist" target="_blank" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-lg w-100"><i class="bi bi-calendar-check me-2"></i>Book via Cal.com</a>
  </div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
```

:::: {.cta-section}
::: {.container .text-center}
## <span class="text-dark">Ready to build your digital infrastructure?</span>

```{=html}
<p class="mb-4">Book a free consultation to discuss your business needs and get a tailored infrastructure proposal.</p>
```

[Book a Consultation](https://cal.com/chenist){.cta-button target="_blank"}
:::
::::
